contract_summary: Btrfs backref iterator release function: releases the embedded path (dropping references on extent buffers) and resets the iterator fields to an empty state. After this call, the iterator must not be used until reinitialized (e.g., via btrfs_backref_iter_alloc and btrfs_backref_iter_start). The caller is responsible for eventually calling this function to avoid leaking path resources.
